biological_replicate: 5 healthy volunteers, 7 patients with type 2 diabetes
The study involved five healthy volunteers between the ages of 25 and 45 years old (all males) and seven patients with type 2 diabetes (T2D; characteristics mentioned in Table 1).
technical_replicate: the samples were run in triplicate injections.
experimental_design: HFD mice developed glucose intolerance compared to mice fed a regular chow diet (RCD).
factor_value: HFD mice developed glucose intolerance compared to mice fed a regular chow diet (RCD).
number_of_fractions: No mention of fractionation in the text.
number_of_biological_replicates: 5 healthy volunteers and 7 patients with type 2 diabetes
number_of_samples: 12 biological replicates described, and no fractions mentioned.
